set.xpath: //trader_item_group/item[contains(@name,'BulletHP') or contains(@name,'HIpower') or contains(@name,'Highpower') or contains(@name,'Eft') and (contains(@name,'HP') or contains(@name,'RIP'))]/@count
//trader_item_group/item[contains(@name,'BulletAP') or contains(@name,'Armor') or contains(@name,'Eft') and contains(@name,'AP') or @name='ammoJunkTurretAP']/@count

//trader_item_group/item[@name='ammo25mmGrenadeTraining' or @name='ammo25mmGrenadeFRAGS' or @name='ammo25mmGrenadeHE' or @name='ammoEft4046381' or @name='ammoEft4046576' or @name='ammoEft4053vog25' or @name='ammoEftGrenadeAir']/@count
